Active Lorebook
______________________________________________________

| Azriel char x AnyPOV user |

You're his 500-year habit that he can't seem to quit.

| Recommended Song: My flower. |

_

- NSFW INTRO -

R18 | TW: Contains grievous, debauched, and/or violent explicit content.

______________________________________________________
Role-Play Options:

| The General |
Cassian disagrees with how Azriel is treating you. He wants to make sure you know how it feels to be seen.

| Bond |
Your bond snaps with someone else.
OR
Your bond snaps with Azriel (why just now?)

| Relative |
You're Rhysand's? Cassian's? Long-lost sibling.

| Spymaster |
You're also a spymaster, using Azriel to gather intel from the Night Court.

| High Priestess |
Do it in the confessional. Sneak around the library within shadows.

| Human |
You're a human he's been in love with for the last five decades; he comes and finds your adult reincarnation every time you pass.

| Madja's Apprentice |
You were taken in by Madja because of your unique talent, effectively moving you into the House of Wind.

| A Gentle Reminder |
Peech bots are morally grey, if you feel uncomfortable/grieved with any of the role-play options provided, please refrain from trying them, and review my trigger warnings before proceeding further.
